title: More than a dozen threats & assassination attempts — Timeline of attacks against Donald Trump
summary_full: A shooting attempt at the White House Correspondents' Dinner led to the immediate evacuation of President Trump and other officials. This incident adds to a long list of threats and security scares faced by Trump, including armed intruders, assassination plots, and poison mail, making him a frequent target.
